truthAudit.Summary: Run 2 was successful in identifying five significant vulnerabilities. It correctly identified four out of the relevant true vulnerabilities (SC-V3-001, SC-V3-004, SC-V3-005, SC-V3-006) with high location accuracy, though it suffered consistency errors regarding severity (SC-V3-001) and exact CWE identification (SC-V3-006). It partially identified the heap overflow (SC-V3-009) by correctly mapping the line numbers and buffer dynamics but misinterpreted the overflow type and missed several other vulnerabilities listed in the target ground truth.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: title: "Format String Vulnerability", vulnerability_type: "Format String", cwe: "CWE-134", severity: "High"
Items.Notes: It accurately identified the logic and CWE at lines 238 but reported it as 'High' severity instead of 'Critical'.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: title: "Command Injection in Config Validation", vulnerability_type: "Command Injection", cwe: "CWE-78", severity: "Critical"
Items.Notes: Perfect identification of truth item SC-V3-004 logic and severity.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: title: "Buffer Overflow via Inverted Logic Check", vulnerability_type: "Buffer Overflow", cwe: "CWE-120", severity: "Critical"
Items.Notes: Matches truth item SC-V3-005 anchors for calculations involving input_buffer_. Recognition of inverted logic check meets ground truth logic.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: title: "Thread Safety Race Condition", vulnerability_type: "Race Condition", cwe: "CWE-366", severity: "Medium"
Items.Notes: Exactly identified the race condition described in SC-V3-006, though the analyst used CWE-366 instead of the ground truth CWE-362.

Items.PreviousOutputQuote: title: "Unbounded Stack Buffer Overflow", vulnerability_type: "Buffer Overflow", cwe: "CWE-120", severity: "High"
Items.Notes: The audited finding is at line 376, which corresponds accurately to truth item SC-V3-009 metadata (buffer_size_ = 256 is line 366). However, it misidentifies it as a Stack Overflow at High severity instead of a Heap Overflow at Critical severity (CWE-122).
